items.name_en: 💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】Inspired by the brand's heritage, the circular interlocking double-G motif adds a touch of elegance to accessories in calfskin. On this black calfskin card holder, this 1970s-style motif radiates timeless charm. The interior is thoughtfully designed with multiple slots for versatile use.
items.name_cn:
💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】Inspired by the brand's heritage, the circular interlocking double-G motif adds a touch of elegance to accessories in calfskin. On this black calfskin card holder, this 1970s-style motif radiates timeless charm. The interior is thoughtfully designed with multiple slots for versatile use.
Black calfskin
Taffeta lining
Enamel circular interlocking details
Inside: Card slots, 1 coin pocket
Snap closure
Model: 818795.
Open dimensions: 22cm (W) x 9cm (H); Closed dimensions: 11cm (W) x 9cm (H)
Weight: approx. 80g
Color: Black full leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 💰 Market Best Version (Original Quality) Authentic Pattern
items.name_cn:
💰 Market Best Version (Original Quality) Authentic Pattern
【Guaranteed Imported Top Grain Leather, No Split Leather, No Microfiber】
Long Zip Wallet
Black Oblique Print
Number: 2ESBC252YSE_H03E
This long zip wallet is understated yet elegant. Crafted from black Oblique print fabric with a black smooth leather interior. The center zip pocket holds coins, while the double cash compartment and 12 card slots provide ample storage. Elegant and spacious, it is an ideal daily companion.
Main: Cotton, Tech Fabric
Lining: Leather, Tech Fabric
Zip Main Compartment
12 Card Slots
Internal Zip Pocket
Double Cash Compartment
2 Pockets with Triangle Linings
Front with Metal-Plated Copper Alloy Dior Logo
Interior with Dior Embossed Logo
Includes Dust Bag
Size: 19.8 x 11 x 2.5 cm (L x H x W)
Fits Credit Cards

items.name_en: 💰 Prada Crossbody Zippered Card Holder for Men and Women
items.name_cn:
💰 Prada Crossbody Zippered Card Holder for Men and Women
Model: 1MM268 Size: 10*8cm Original single quality
Color details as shown in the picture, exclusive real shot. Fits inside a bag or can be held by hand.
A small and cute leather good made of cross-grain cowhide.
Classic and practical zippered design, with accordion-style card slots inside for easy organization. Perfect for carrying just your phone in summer or placing inside a small bag. Your best choice for taste.
